name: qualimetry-vscode-csharp-plugin
description: Real-time Qualimetry C# analysis in your editor. Provisions the Qualimetry Roslyn analyzer and syncs rules from a SonarQube quality profile; findings then appear as you type via your IDE's built-in C# engine.

commands.title: Qualimetry: Add C# analyzer to project
Qualimetry: Sync rules from SonarQube profile

csharpAnalyzer.autoProvision.description: When a C# project is opened without the Qualimetry analyzer referenced, offer to add it so findings appear as you type.

csharpAnalyzer.sonarqube.url.description: Base URL of the SonarQube server, for example https://sonar.example.com.

csharpAnalyzer.sonarqube.token.description: SonarQube user token. Sent as the Basic auth username with an empty password.

csharpAnalyzer.profileName.description: Name of the SonarQube quality profile to sync rules from.

csharpAnalyzer.analyzerVersion.description: Version of the Qualimetry.CSharp.Analyzer NuGet package to reference.
